title: The One With Ross and Monica's Cousin

lines.text: Central Perk, Monica and Phoebe are on the couch as Joey enters.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (To Joey) Oh hey! How was your audition?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm sorry, do I know you?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Nothing, I'm just practicing blowing you off because I'm gonna be a big movie star!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh! You got it?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, no not yet. But the audition went really good.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What was it for?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, it's this big budget period movie about these three Italian brothers who come to America around the turn of the century. It's really classy! Oh, and the director is supposed to be the next, next Martin Scorcese.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: The next, next?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, there's this guy from Chicago who's supposed to be the next Martin Scorcese, all right? But then this guy's right after him. (Joey's cell phone rings and he answers it.) Hello!

lines.speaker: Estelle
lines.text: Joey! It's Estelle! I just talked to the casting people; they loved you!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (to Monica and Phoebe) They loved me!

lines.speaker: Estelle
lines.text: Yeah, they wanna see you again tomorrow.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (on phone) Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Estelle
lines.text: There's just one thing. Do you have a problem with full frontal nudity?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Are you kidding me? I never rent a movie without it! (Listens) Oh. (Listens) Uh, okay uh let me call you back. (Hangs up.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What's the matter?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: They want me to be totally naked in the movie!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wow!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I know! My grandmother's gonna see this!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Grandma's gonna have to get in line.
Opening Credits
Monica and Chandler's, (although its really just Monica's now with Matthew Perry in rehab) Monica is folding her laundry with Ross reading the paper and Phoebe standing in the kitchen.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey the wedding is so close! Are you getting nervous?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah. But a part of me also can't wait 'til it's over. Chandler and I have this pact not to have sex again until the wedding.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: A no sex pact huh? I actually have one of those going on with every woman in America.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey Phoebe, will you give me a hand?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I gotta make up the guest bedroom. (To Ross) Hey, Cousin Cassie is coming to stay with us a few days.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Cassie?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Uh-hmm.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wow, I haven't seen her for like forever. I wonder if she still carries that Barbie everywhere she goes.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ross, she's 25 years old.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So what! I still have-No you're probably right.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (entering) Hi!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey Pheebs, can I talk to you over here for a second?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Subtle guys!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I know you're planning my surprise bridal shower.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (laughs) Well okay-Well don't ruin it! Just play along at least!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay. Sorry. (She goes into the guest bedroom.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (To Phoebe) Oh my God! We have to throw her a shower?!
Monica and Chandler's, Joey is entering.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey! What did you decide to do about the movie?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I don't know! It's not like it's porn! This is a serious, legitimate movie. Y'know? And the nudity is really important to the story.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's what you say about porn.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You're right. Maybe I shouldn't even go on the call back.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No! No you should! A lot of major actors do nude scenes! I mean the chance to star in a movie? Come on!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well that's true. And I am only naked in one scene. Plus it sounds really great. My character's catholic and he falls in love with this Jewish girl. Who run away together and they get caught in this big rainstorm. So we go into this barn and undress each other and hold each other. It's really sweet and-and tender.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Plus, everyone's gonna see your thing. (Giggles.)
Phoebe's apartment, Phoebe and Rachel are trying to plan Monica's shower.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well when can we have this shower?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: She has got so much going on we-we have only two options. We have Friday...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well that's only two days away. What is the other option?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yesterday!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well if we make it yesterday, woo-hoo! We're done!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God Phoebe, this is impossible! We can't do this by Friday! We have to find a place. We have to invite people! We have to get food! There's just too much to do! It's impossible! We can't do it! We cannot do it! We cannot do it!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Rachel, calm down!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (calmly) Okay. I'm sorry. You're right, you're right.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (grabs and shakes Rachel) Just calm down woman!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Phoebe, I already, I already did.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh okay. All right, then I need to calm down a little.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. Okay. (They sit down.) I think we can do this if we just get organized. All right? We have two days to plan this party. We just need to make fast decisions! Okay? All right, where are we gonna have it?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uh, here. What time?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: 4 o'clock. Food?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Finger sandwiches and tea.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ooh great! Very Monica.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: And chili!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ah you went one too far. Uh, flowers or balloons?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Both!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: We're paying for this y'know.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Neither.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. Umm, what should we do for the theme?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Lusts of the flesh.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (pause) What?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I don't know. (Timidly) A cowboy theme?
Monica and Chandler's, Monica is on the couch writing when Chandler enters to make his brief cameo.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Y'know I'm-I'm really glad we decided not to sleep together before the wedding.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh boy me too!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Y'know I was thinking if we had a...a big fight and uh we broke up for a few hours...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Technically we could have sex again. What do you think, bossy and domineering?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: The wedding is off, sloppy and immature!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That's me! Come on!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay. (They both jump up to head for there room, but Monica stops.) But wait, we can't. My Cousin Cassie is in the guest room, we're supposed to have lunch.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well get rid of her, obsessive and shrill.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Shrill?! The wedding is back on!

Cassie enters from the guest room, with her hair up. The extremely beautiful and sexy Denise Richards is playing Cassie. Woo hoo! For those of you who don't know who she is, rent Wild Things and she was also the last Bond girl in The World Is Not Enough.

lines.speaker: Cassie
lines.text: I thought I heard voices. You must be Chandler.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (transfixed) Hi! Nice to meet you!

lines.speaker: Cassie
lines.text: Nice to meet you too.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So, are you ready to go?

lines.speaker: Cassie
lines.text: Yeah.

She lets her hair down and whips her hair around in Baywatch-esque slow motion with a Barry White song in the background. Chandler needless to say can't help but stare along with the rest of the male and lesbian population of North America.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (catching him) Chandler!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'll be right with you.
Central Perk, Ross is there as Chandler and Monica enters.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (To Ross) Cassie needs to stay at your place.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What-why?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Because Purvry Perverson over here can't stop staring at her.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?! Chandler she's our cousin!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I was not staring at her. Okay? I was just listening intently. It's called being a good conversationalist. Watch. (Stares at Monica's eyes.) Say something.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You were staring about eight inches south of there.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Fine, she can stay at my place. By the way, what-what does Cassie even look like now.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: She looks exactly like Aunt Marilyn.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Umm, so this Aunt Marilyn is-is-is-is she coming to the wedding?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wafer thin ice!
A Casting Director's Office, Joey is entering for his callback.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, I'm back!

lines.speaker: The Casting Director
lines.text: Hi-hi Joey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh so, will-will I be reading the same scene again?

lines.speaker: The Casting Director
lines.text: Actually, I tried to call to you. You didn't need to come down here today.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh great! Y'know I would've been perfect for this part, but whatever! Y'know, thanks for making a bad decision and ruining your movie! Good day! (Starts to leave.)

lines.speaker: The Casting Director
lines.text: Wait Joey! You didn't need to come down because the director saw your tape from yesterday and loved it.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: And scene! Huh? Wasn't that fun? We did a little improv there. Yeah! Okay! So you-you-you-you were saying?

lines.speaker: The Casting Director
lines.text: Well, the director thinks you're really right for the part and wants to meet you tomorrow.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wow! Sure! That's great!

lines.speaker: The Casting Director
lines.text: Oh and your agent said you were okay with the nudity.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah! Yeah sure, just long as it's handled tastefully and that barn is not too cold.

lines.speaker: The Casting Director
lines.text: Terrific! Well uh, there's one more thing. Uhh, uh it's really important to the director that everything in this movie is authentic. Yeah and so in your love scene with Sarah she talks about how she's never seen a naked man who wasn't Jewish. So... (Laughs.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So...What?

lines.speaker: The Casting Director
lines.text: So uh well the director is insisting that whoever play that part be authentically, anatomically not Jewish. Do you know what I'm saying?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: The Casting Director
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No. What?

lines.speaker: The Casting Director
lines.text: An Italian Catholic immigrant at this time would not be...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Barmifsaed?
The casting director shakes her head.
Monica and Chandler's, Joey is telling Monica what the casting director was trying to get too.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So to get this part you can't be?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: But you are?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: But you told them you weren't?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's right.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wow! Wow! And it's definitely all gone? There's nothing there to work with? (Joey glares at her.) What were you thinking?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I don't know! I really want this part! And they tell you no matter what you get asked at an audition you say yes. Like if-if they want you to ride a horse, you tell 'em you can! And just figure out how to do it later.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Joey! This is not like learning to ride a horse! This is like learning to...grow a turtleneck!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I kn-I know! I know! Okay? And apparently tomorrow when I go in to meet the director I have to take off my clothes so that they can see what my body looks like.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God, what are you gonna do?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I just have to call my agent and tell her I can't do the part. (Gets up for the phone.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Unless!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Unless what?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, this may sound crazy, but there maybe something we could fashion.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Like what?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well I'm not sure yet, but umm of the top of my head I'm thinking double sided tape and some sort of luncheon meat.
Joey and Rachel's, Phoebe is entering and Rachel is still planning.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey! I've got a great idea for party favors for the shower. Okay, we get some uh mahogany boxes and carve everyone's names in them and inside is everyone's individual birth stone.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. Okay. All right, you take care of that. And meanwhile, the party is tomorrow and we still don't have a guest list.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay. Okay! Well okay, who do we know that's coming? Me. Are you?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey! What's up Mon?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well uh, I'm trying to make something for Joey. Do you mind if I raid your fridge?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Have at it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay. (Opens the fridge.) All right, turkey. Eh, that won't work. Cheese? (Picks it up) That won't work. Olive loaf? (Picks it up) I hope that won't work.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Are you makin' him a sandwich?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No it's umm, more like a wrap. Okay so uh, I'm gonna go guys.

lines.speaker: Phoebe and Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I guess you can get back to deciding on what to get me for a present! (Runs out.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (To Phoebe, after Monica's gone) We have to get her a present?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay but look! Look at what I got! It's her address book! (Holds it up.) We have a guest list!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God you're amazing! Did you just pull that out of her purse?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uh-huh, and a little seed money for the party. (Holds up $40.)
Ross's apartment, there is a knock on the door and Ross opens it to Cassie.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (shocked at her beauty) Cassie?!

lines.speaker: Cassie
lines.text: Hey Ross!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Cassie
lines.text: (hugs him) It's been so long! Last time I saw you, you were setting up your tent in line to see Return of the Jedi.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh. Oh, that's right. So-so you did see me that day because it seemed like you didn't.

lines.speaker: Cassie
lines.text: Ah yeah, sorry about that.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It's okay. Come, come on in.

lines.speaker: Cassie
lines.text: Thanks for letting me stay here! I mean Monica's place was nice, but her fiancee sure stares a lot.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh.

She sets down her bag and we travel back to slow motion world. She once again whips her hair around in slow motion with the love doctor Barry White singing in the background. And I'd also like to take this opportunity to mention that she can also be seen in Starship Troopers and that she was born in Downers Grove, Illinois which just happens to be a few miles from where I live. Anyway Cousin Ross is now staring.

lines.speaker: Cassie
lines.text: Oh my God! You do a great Chandler!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh-huh. Yeah I-I have a knack for impressions.

lines.speaker: Cassie
lines.text: Well, maybe after we get reacquainted uh, you can do me.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah-No!!
Commercial Break
Ross's apartment, Cassie is eating dinner and Ross is pacing behind her because of what she's eating.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Cassie, how you-how you doin' on that...hot dog.

lines.speaker: Cassie
lines.text: I'm all done.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (quietly) Thank God.

lines.speaker: Cassie
lines.text: I guess the last time we really hung out was when our parents rented that beach house together.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh right. Right. Ooh, remember the time I uh, I pinned you down and tickled you 'til you cried? (She laughs) We're probably too old to do that now.

lines.speaker: Cassie
lines.text: I'll always remember that summer, because it's when I got all of these freckles. (She pulls her blouse open to show him her shoulder and bra strap.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (looking then moving away quickly) Uh-huh! Uh-huh! And-and-and I'll always remember that summer because that's when I realized that we are related.

lines.speaker: Cassie
lines.text: It took you that long to figure it out, huh?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well I'm, I'm a little slow. (To himself) Just as our children would be.
Phoebe's apartment, it's Monica's bridal shower and Phoebe is passing out some finger food.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: How are you? (The woman nods) Good. (She goes over to another couple of women.) Hi, thanks for coming.

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.text: Oh thank you.
The other woman declines.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Thank you. (To the other woman) No? (She nods.) All right. (She goes to another pairing.) Oh, it's so nice to see you.

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: The Other Woman
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay. (Goes over to Rachel.) Hey Rach?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Who the hell are all these people?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, I don't know. I called all the people in Monica's phone book and these are the only ones who could show up on 24 hours notice.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hmm, y'know there's another word for people like that. Losers!
A woman approaches.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (to her) Hi! I'm Rachel. This is Phoebe. I'm the maid of honor. How do you know Monica?

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.text: I was her accountant four years ago.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohhhh!

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.text: I'm very interested to find out who's been doing her taxes these last four years.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That's great!

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.text: So, what time is Monica supposed to get here?

lines.speaker: Phoebe and Rachel
lines.text: (to each other) I don't know.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (to the woman) Excuse us for a minute. (They go into the kitchen.) You didn't tell her to come?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You were supposed to tell her!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No I wasn't! You were supposed to tell her to come and I was supposed to bring the cake!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Fine, I'll go call her.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes! And please tell her to bring a cake!
Joey and Rachel's, Joey is standing at the counter as Monica enters carrying a tray.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, we have a lot of options here, a number of prototypes for you to try on.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wow! This looks great!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah! Okay, this one is a mushroom cap. (Points to it.) Umm, this one is made of bologna. (Points.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: And-and-and-and-and the toothpicks?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, just until the glue dries.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Thank God!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (to a whole group) Now, these are-are more realistic, but perishable.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ah.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay? (To a different group) Over here we have pink suede, which is nice. But umm, if it gets wet then you know it's gonna shrink.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well maybe we just take that one away. (Picks it up and throws it away.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I also, did a little something in fur. But umm, that's really just for me. (Rubs it against her cheek.) Okay. So, why don't you go into your room and try these on and we'll see-get a better idea of what's gonna work.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Thanks, you are such a good friend. And this is so weird.
He goes into his room to try them on and closes the door.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ow!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Toothpick?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What are you trying on now?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: The fruit roll up.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Delicious.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Joey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wait a minute! Wait a minute! We have a winner!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?! Which one?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: The Silly Putty! It's not so silly anymore!
They hug.
Ross's apartment, Cassie and Ross are watching a movie and Cassie is pouring Ross some more wine as Ross has his hands full with the glass and holding the bowl of popcorn in his lap.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (in his head) She's your cousin. She's your cousin! If she knew what was going on in your head she'd think you were sick! (She grabs some popcorn.) Or would she? Let's back up a second. She was the one who suggested opening a bottle of wine. She was the one who turned down the lights. She was the one that wanted to rent Logan's Run, the sexiest movie ever. (She grabs the blanket from behind him and looks at him.) Oh, I know that look. Forget it. I want it. She wants it. I'm going in.
They exchange looks, smile, and shrug their shoulders before Ross suddenly lunges forward in an attempt to kiss her, but she expertly backs away.

lines.speaker: Cassie
lines.text: Hey! What the hell are you doing?! (They sit back up.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (in his head) Say something clever! (Pause.) Okay, doesn't have to be clever, it just has to be words. Say some words. (Pause) Any words will do. (Pause) Oh my God! This is the longest that anyone has not talked ever! (Pause) There is nothing you can say to make this worse!! So just say something!! (Pause.) (To her) I-I, I uh haven't had sex in a very long time. (She leaves.) (In his head) Yeah, you really shouldn't have said anything.
outside Phoebe's apartment, Monica is knocking on the door.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Phoebe! Rachel! It's Monica! I wonder what you could possibly need me for on such short notice! (She bursts into the apartment to find only Phoebe and Rachel sitting on the couch.) Oh.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh Monica, we are so sorry.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: For what?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well first, for forgetting to throw you a bridal shower.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: And then for forgetting to invite you to it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You al-you already had it?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah. Well, we called everyone in your phone book and bunch of people came, but it took us so long to get you here that they-they had to leave.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, we wanted to throw you a big surprise and a great shower, and now you don't have either.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: We ruined everything.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ugh...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well no wait a minute that's not true! No, what did, that was really sweet. And it kinda works out for the best.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What do you, what do you mean?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well now, I get to spend my shower with the only people I really love! I mean, I get all those presents (Motions to the pile in the corner) without having to talk to people I don't even like!
Suddenly, everyone stands up and comes out of hiding. All of them are glaring at Monica.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Surprise...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Sur-surprise.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: ...Monica.
The casting director's office, Joey is there to show off to the director, so to speak.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: And what's cool is, the character is from Naples, right?

lines.speaker: The Director
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: My whole family's from Naples!

lines.speaker: The Director
lines.text: Oh that's great! Okay, well I've heard everything I need to hear. I just need to uh, Leslie...

lines.speaker: The Casting Director
lines.text: Joey, this is awkward part.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh! Hey right! Not a problem. (He starts taking off his clothes.) I totally understand. You need to y'know make sure I don't have any horrible scars or tattoos. Don't you worry; I have nothing to hide. (He drops his pants and stands back up and looks down.) So there you go, that's me. (We cut to a camera angle looking at the casting director and movie director through Joey's legs.) One hundred percent natural! (Suddenly, there's a thud as something falls off.) (Everyone is shocked.) I tell ya, that has never happened before.
Ending Credits
Phoebe's apartment, Phoebe is getting out linens for Cassie who is in the bathroom.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Cassie, are you finding everything okay in there?

lines.speaker: Cassie
lines.text: Yeah! Thank you so much for letting me stay here.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh! No problem! I... (Cassie emerges from the bathroom and we once again visit slow motion Barry White background music land with the sexy hair-flipping thing going on, only this time Phoebe is entranced. For more information on Denise Richards you can visit your local library or look her up on the Internet at her official website at www.deniserichards.com.)

lines.speaker: Cassie
lines.text: (noticing her) What?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (in her head) Say something! Say anything! Ask her out! She's not your cousin!
End
